title: Healing from Shame: Finding Freedom in Christ's Resurrection
snippet: So I'm wondering how many of you have ever done something that you're really ashamed of? This powerful question opened a recent Easter message from Life.Church that dives deep into one of humanity's most pervasive struggles: shame. The speaker shares his personal journey with shame while offering a path to healing through Christ's resurrection.

title: How to Secure the Best College Letters of Recommendation
snippet: What if the key to your dream college isn\\\\u2019t just your grades or test scores, but the words others choose to vouch for you?\\\\n\\\\nIn the fiercely competitive world of college admissions, letters of...

title: Freedom from Guilt: Finding Peace in God's Grace
snippet: When you do something wrong and you know it's wrong, how do you feel? Well, you feel guilty. But let me ask you this, have you ever had the same feelings when you didn't do anything wrong? This powerful question opened Dr. Charles Stanley's exploration of guilt's true sources—distinguishing between legitimate guilt from sin and false guilt from a distorted view of God—and reveals how God's grace provides complete freedom from both.

title: Get Rid of Your Guilt
snippet: I want to ask you a very personal question and I hope this isn't too direct but how many of you have ever been caught doing something wrong?

title: How to Get Your Spiritual Fire Back When You Feel Distant from God
snippet: Friend, do you feel dry, how about depleted? Or maybe you feel like somewhere along the way you've gone from burning for Jesus, to lukewarm, and you're not even sure when it happened.

title: How 20 Years of Anxiety Ended When I Stopped Fighting It
snippet: I dealt with anxiety for 20 years. I could not remember a time when it wasn't a huge problem for me that I was dealing with.

title: 7 Micro Habits to Regulate Depression or Trauma (Shutdown Response)
snippet: When depression or trauma leaves you feeling shut down, numb, or disconnected, traditional advice often falls short. You're told to "just exercise more," "think positive," or "push through it"—but when your nervous system is in a shutdown state, these approaches can feel impossible or even counterproductive.

title: When You’ve Given Up on Prayer
snippet: When we've given up on prayer, it's not because we don't believe in God or don't want to connect with Him. Often, we struggle with prayer for very practical, understandable reasons that have nothing to do with our faith or devotion.

title: Psychologist: 5 Anxiety Rules to Stop Avoiding Life
snippet: Anxiety doesn't get smaller. Your life gets bigger first. I'm a psychologist. I've treated anxiety for over 15 years and I've had it much longer than that.
